hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */backend/*.py) o=$(cd /Users/jw.park/ps-excel-onboarding/backend && INFRA_MODE=local DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5432 DB_USER=test DB_PASSWORD=test DB_NAME=test .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q 2>&1) || { printf '%s\n' "$o" >&2; exit 2; } ;; esac; }
